Imports

httpclient

Types

Http = ref object
HttpForm = openArray[tuple[key, val: string]]
HttpResponse = object
RetryAttemptCallback = proc (): uint

Procs

proc get(H: Http; uri: Uri | string): Response
Sends a GET request to the specified URI and returns the response body as a string. 
proc get(H: typedesc[Http]; uri: Uri | string): Response
Sends a GET request to the specified URI and returns the response body as a string. 
proc get[T](H: Http; uri: Uri | string; t: typedesc[T]): T
Sends a GET request to the specified URI and returns the response deserialized into the specified T type. 
proc normalizePath(path: string): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Collapses multiple slashes into one, e.g. //foo//bar -> /foo/bar 
proc post(H: typedesc[Http]; uri: Uri | string; body: string = ""): Response
Sends a POST request to the specified URI with the given body and returns the response. 
proc post(H: typedesc[Http]; uri: Uri | string; httpForm: HttpForm): Response
Sends a POST request to the specified URI with the given body and returns the response. 
proc retry(H: Http; times: uint): Http {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Quickly adds a retry to the request 
proc retry(H: Http; times: uint; retryAttemptCallback: RetryAttemptCallback) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Manually calculate the number of milliseconds to sleep between attempts, you may pass a closure as the second argument to the retry method. 
proc withHeaders(H: typedesc[Http];
                 httpHeaders: openArray[tuple[key, val: string]]): Http
Instantiates a new Http object with the specified headers. 
proc withToken(H: Http; token: string): Http {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Quickly adds a token to the request's Authorization header

Exports

body, body
